agent.name: Patient Matching Agent
agent.role: Patient onboarding, healer matching, and session booking
agent.description: Handles patient intake form completion, healer recommendation algorithm, and booking coordination. Matches patients with compatible healers based on pain type, preferences, location, and healer availability.

responsibilities: Deliver intake form to high-intent leads
Guide patients through intake form completion (conversational UX)
Run healer matching algorithm with patient preferences
Display healer match cards with ratings and availability
Handle healer selection and booking flow
Integrate with Stripe for secure payment processing
Sync bookings with healer calendars (Google Calendar, Calendly)
Send confirmation emails to patient and healer
Handle booking failures and offer alternatives
Escalate edge cases (no match found, special requests)

stages.name: Ingest
stages.description: Collect patient intake data and healer availability
steps: Listen for trigger: Lead reaches engagement threshold (moved to Early Access)
Fetch healer database: specialties, ratings, availability, location, experience
Listen for form events: form_started, form_field_completed, form_submitted
Listen for booking events: healer_selected, payment_submitted, calendar_sync_completed
Monitor calendar API (Calendly/Google): healer availability updates
data_sources: Orchestration trigger (patient ready for Early Access)

stages.name: Reason
stages.description: Determine matching algorithm input and booking strategy
steps: Extract patient preferences from intake form:
- Pain type (back, neck, chronic fatigue, migraine, etc.)
- Preferred healing modality (reiki, sound, ayurveda, breathwork, etc.)
- Location (city/region or remote preference)
- Availability (flexible, weekends only, specific times)
- Budget (hourly rate preference)
- Healer experience preference (new, experienced, expert)
Identify matching healer candidates using algorithm:
1. Filter by modality match (exact or related)
2. Filter by location/remote capability
3. Filter by availability (match calendar slots)
4. Score by: rating (40%), reviews (20%), experience (20%), timezone convenience (10%), price (10%)
5. Generate match quality score (0-100)
Evaluate results:
- Best match found (score >75): Show 1 healer prominently + 2 alternatives
- Multiple matches (score 60-75): Show top 3 healers, let patient choose
- Weak matches (score <60): Offer waitlist or alternative modality
- No matches: Escalate to human concierge

matching_algorithm.modality_match: 1.0 if exact match, 0.8 if related specialty, 0.5 if different
matching_algorithm.availability_match: 1.0 if available this week, 0.8 if next week, 0.5 if >7 days
matching_algorithm.location_convenience: 1.0 if same city, 0.9 if same region, 0.8 if remote telehealth, 0.5 if international

stages.name: Execute
stages.description: Guide patient through matching and booking
steps: Send intake form email/SMS to patient with link
Monitor form completion; send reminders if abandoned (24h, 48h)
Once form submitted:
1. Run matching algorithm
2. Generate healer match cards (profile, rating, testimonials, availability)
3. Send healer introduction email to patient
4. Present healer cards in app with 'Book' CTA
When patient selects healer:
1. Show available time slots (in patient's timezone)
2. Present payment form (Stripe hosted checkout)
3. Process payment
4. Lock session in database
5. Create calendar event (Calendly/Google Calendar)
6. Send confirmation email to patient + SMS reminder option
7. Send notification to healer with patient intake notes
8. Set pre-session reminders (48h, 24h, 2h before)
Handle failures:
- Payment declined: Offer alternative payment method, don't charge
- Healer unresponsive: Auto-assign alternative healer, notify patient
- Calendar sync failed: Manual escalation to support

stages.name: Log
stages.description: Track intake, matching, and booking metrics
steps: Log form_started: timestamp, patient_id
Log form_field_completion: field_name, value, timestamp
Log form_submitted: timestamp, all_responses
Log matching_algorithm_run: input_preferences, algorithm_version, results
Log healer_match_displayed: match_rank, match_score, healer_id
Log healer_selected: healer_id, selection_time
Log payment_processed: amount, status, stripe_transaction_id
Log calendar_event_created: healer_calendar, event_id, start_time
Log booking_confirmed: session_id, patient_id, healer_id, scheduled_time

stages.name: Escalate
stages.description: Route special cases to human concierge
steps: If no healer match found (score <60) → Offer waitlist, escalate to concierge
If form abandoned >48 hours → Send reminder + offer 1-on-1 support call
If payment fails 2x → Escalate to payment specialist, offer manual processing
If healer doesn't confirm session within 24h → Auto-assign alternative healer + notify both parties
If patient requests special accommodation (accessibility, specific timing) → Escalate to concierge
If form data incomplete/invalid → Ask clarifying questions in-app, escalate if patient unresponsive

triggers.name: patient_ready_for_early_access
triggers.description: Patient reaches high engagement in nurture stage
triggers.condition: Engagement score > 70 OR clicked Early Access CTA
triggers.action: Send intake form email, add to Early Access workflow

triggers.name: intake_form_started
triggers.description: Patient begins filling out intake form
triggers.condition: Patient opens form URL and starts typing
triggers.action: Log start event, begin form progress tracking

triggers.name: intake_form_abandoned
triggers.condition: Form started but not submitted for >30 min with no activity
triggers.action: Save progress, send reminder at 24h if still abandoned

triggers.name: intake_form_submitted
triggers.description: Patient completes and submits intake form
triggers.condition: Form submit button clicked, all required fields filled
triggers.action: Run matching algorithm, display healer matches

triggers.name: healer_selected
triggers.action: Show available time slots, present payment form

triggers.name: payment_submitted
triggers.action: Process payment, confirm with Stripe, lock session if successful

triggers.name: payment_success
triggers.action: Create session record, sync calendar, send confirmations

triggers.name: payment_failure
triggers.action: Notify patient, offer retry or alternative payment method

triggers.name: calendar_sync_needed
triggers.description: Create calendar event for scheduled session
triggers.action: Create event in healer's calendar (Calendly/Google), add to patient's calendar

triggers.name: healer_confirmation_timeout
triggers.action: Escalate to concierge, offer alternative healer to patient

integrations.fallback: If API down, escalate to support for manual payment processing
If API down, manually create calendar event in fallback calendar
Use cached healer data (updated every hour)
Queue email in buffer; retry hourly

inputs.description: Primary pain complaint (back, neck, migraine, chronic fatigue, etc.)

outputs.example: Expert reiki practitioner in your area, 4.9 rating, available this weekend

outputs.description: Array of available time slots this healer has

functional: Intake form delivers to all high-intent leads
Form completion logic captures all required fields
Matching algorithm runs within 2 seconds of form submission
Healer matches displayed in patient app within 5 seconds
Calendar sync creates events in healer's calendar
Confirmation emails delivered to both parties within 5 minutes
performance: Matching algorithm success rate > 95% (finds at least 1 match)
Patient views healer within 48h of match > 85%

error_handling.policy: Graceful degradation, escalate edge cases, never lose session data

error_cases.error: Form validation fails (invalid email, missing field)
error_cases.handling: Return form error to user, highlight invalid field
error_cases.escalation: If >5% form errors, alert product team

error_cases.handling: Show message, offer waitlist option, escalate to concierge
error_cases.retry: Check again after new healers added
error_cases.escalation: Concierge calls patient to find solution

error_cases.handling: Show error, offer retry or alternative payment
Lock session in database, queue calendar sync
error_cases.escalation: If not synced within 30 min, manual verification

error_cases.error: Healer unresponsive to session (no confirmation after 24h)

error_cases.handling: Roll back transaction, return error to user

startup_checklist: Test Stripe payment in test mode
Test calendar sync with test healer
Load healer database and verify counts
Perform dry-run of intake form → matching → booking
